$description: Blinqx component specifications with semantic metadata. Each component maps directly to a Figma section in the Style Guide.

$formatGuide.$description: Which components are relevant per output format. Check this before implementing.

prototype.$description: React, HTML, CSS, Tailwind, v0, Cursor — use ALL components below.

documents.$description: pptx, pdf, docx, xlsx — only visual/layout patterns apply, not interactive specs.
notes: Map card → content box with white bg, border #C5DBE3
Map header → section header with bg #E2EDF1
Map chip styles → status badges/tags in tables
Use python-pptx with .potx template for presentations (see references/pptx-guide.md)

button.$description: Pill-shaped buttons. NEVER square. Always border-radius: 48px.
button.$why: Pill shape signals 'approachable' — critical for consumer-facing financial software. Sharp buttons feel too enterprise/banking.

$usage.filled-primary: Primary page action — 'Opslaan', 'Bevestigen'. Max 1 per action group.
$usage.filled-cta: Highest emphasis — login, onboarding CTAs. Max 1 per entire view. Yellow.
$usage.filled-danger: Destructive actions — 'Verwijderen', 'Annuleren abonnement'. Always requires confirmation.
$usage.outlined: Secondary actions — 'Annuleren', 'Terug'. Pair with 1 filled button.
$usage.text: Lowest emphasis — 'Meer info', inline links. Use when space is tight.
$usage.iconOnly: Overflow menus, close buttons, toggles. MUST have tooltip.

$a11y.keyboard: Enter/Space activates. Tab navigates between buttons.
$a11y.focus: Visible focus ring required (border-focus token). Never remove outline.
$a11y.disabled: aria-disabled=true, reduced contrast (N60 text on N20 bg). Not focusable.
$a11y.minTarget: 44x44px touch target, even if button appears smaller

$content.tone: Active voice, start with verb — 'Opslaan', 'Verwijderen', 'Bekijk details'
$content.avoid: Never 'Klik hier', 'Druk op knop', or vague 'OK'/'Ja'/'Nee' without context
$content.locale: Dutch (NL). Use Dutch verbs: Opslaan, Annuleren, Verwijderen, Bevestigen, Toevoegen

rules: NEVER use square buttons — always pill (48px radius)
Don't mix >2 button styles in one action group

codeExample.tailwind: bg-[var(--surface/surface-blue-default,#6da6b9)] h-[48px] rounded-[48px] px-[24px] text-[var(--text/text-default,#1d2632)] font-semibold text-[14px] leading-[20px]

input.$description: Floating label inputs with bottom-border only. NEVER fully bordered boxes.
input.$why: Bottom-border reduces visual clutter in data-heavy mortgage forms (20+ fields). Keeps focus on content, not containers.

$usage.floating-label: Default for all single-line data entry. Use for text, email, numbers, dates.
$usage.pre-label: Horizontal layouts where label and value sit side-by-side. Use in compact data displays or read-only views.
$usage.radio: Mutually exclusive choices (max 5 options). Use radio, not dropdown, when options ≤5.
$usage.checkbox: Multiple selections or boolean toggles. Use checkbox, not switch, for form submissions.

$a11y.keyboard: Tab navigates between fields. Arrow keys within radio groups. Space toggles checkbox.
$a11y.focus: Bottom border changes to B100 (#6DA6B9). Label floats up as visual indicator.
$a11y.error: aria-invalid=true, aria-describedby links to error message. Border turns R100.
$a11y.label: Always use <label> linked via htmlFor. Floating label is visual only — screen reader uses real label.

$content.label: Noun phrase — 'Achternaam', 'E-mailadres', 'Postcode'. No colon, no instruction.
$content.placeholder: Optional. Example value — 'jan@voorbeeld.nl', '1234 AB'. Never repeat the label.
$content.error: Specific: 'Voer een geldig e-mailadres in', not 'Ongeldige invoer'.
$content.helper: Optional hint below field: 'Minimaal 8 tekens' or 'Format: DD-MM-JJJJ'.

rules: Inputs use bottom-border ONLY — never fully bordered boxes
Label floats from center to top on focus/fill

menu.$description: Sidebar navigation (80px dark), pull-down menus, top bars, and monograms.
menu.$why: Dark navy sidebar creates a professional anchor. Yellow active states provide clear wayfinding without overwhelming the interface.

header.$description: Page headers with optional tabs and action buttons.
header.$why: Blue-20 background creates a visual anchor at the top. H1 titles establish clear page context for data-heavy workflows.

$usage.withTabs: Multi-section pages (dashboard, detail views). Tabs allow switching without page reload.
$usage.withActions: Pages with primary actions ('Nieuwe aanvraag', 'Exporteren'). Buttons right-aligned.
$usage.minimal: Simple pages with only a title. Use when content speaks for itself.

$content.title: Page name in Dutch, sentence case. Max 4 words.
$content.subtitle: Optional context — date range, record count, or breadcrumb.

header.tabArea: flex row at bottom, no padding-bottom

tab.$description: Horizontal tab bar with active indicator.
tab.$why: Bottom-border indicator (not bg change) keeps the UI calm. Tabs sit inside the header for spatial efficiency.

$usage.when: 2-6 related sections on one page. Use tabs, not separate pages, when content shares context.
$usage.avoid: Don't use tabs for 1 section or 7+ sections. Use sidebar nav for deep hierarchies.

$a11y.keyboard: Arrow keys navigate tabs. Tab key moves to panel content.
$a11y.focus: Active tab has visible 2px bottom border.

tab.$paddingNote: horizontal 16px confirmed from Figma (px-[16px]), was incorrectly 24px

active.$borderNote: Figma uses --surface/surface-blue-default for tab border, NOT --border/border-focus. Same hex (#6DA6B9) but different token.

codeExample.tailwind: border-b-2 border-[var(--surface/surface-blue-default,#6da6b9)] pb-[16px] pt-[12px] px-[16px] font-semibold text-[14px]

alert.$description: Dialog-style alerts with icon, title, body, and action buttons.
alert.$why: Icon circles per status type create instant visual recognition. B120 title color separates from body text without using Bold.

$usage.when: Confirmation before destructive actions, important notifications that require user response.
$usage.avoid: Don't use for informational messages (use messageBar). Don't use for form validation (use inline errors).

$a11y.keyboard: Escape closes. Tab cycles through action buttons. Focus trapped inside.
$a11y.focus: Auto-focus on primary action button when opened.

$content.title: Short question or statement — 'Weet je het zeker?', 'Aanvraag verwijderen'

iconCircle.$sizeNote: 80px is the circle container. The icon INSIDE is 48px. Confirmed from Figma (size-[80px]).

modal.$description: Overlay modals with close button, optional icon, and action buttons.
modal.$why: Modals interrupt flow intentionally — use only when task requires focused attention away from the page context.

$usage.when: Complex forms, detail views, or multi-step tasks that need focus. Use small (480px) for simple, large (800px) for data-rich.
$usage.avoid: Don't use modals for simple confirmations (use alert). Don't stack modals on modals.

$a11y.keyboard: Escape closes. Tab cycles through interactive elements. Focus trapped inside.
$a11y.focus: Auto-focus on first interactive element or close button.

$content.title: Task name — 'Nieuwe klant toevoegen', 'Document uploaden'
$content.close: X button top-right, always present. aria-label='Sluiten'.

card.$description: Content containers. White bg, 16px radius, card shadow.
card.$why: 16px radius is friendly but not childish — right for financial context. White cards on light bg create depth without heavy shadows.

datePicker.$description: Calendar date picker with day grid.

switch.$why: Switches give immediate visual feedback for on/off states. Blue ON = active/enabled aligns with the primary action color.

$usage.when: Instant toggles that take effect immediately (settings, preferences). Use switch, not checkbox, for real-time toggles.
$usage.avoid: Don't use in forms that require a submit button — use checkbox instead.

$a11y.aria: aria-checked=true/false, aria-label required if no adjacent label.

$content.label: Describe the ON state: 'Notificaties', 'Automatisch opslaan'. Adjacent label, not inside switch.

chip.$why: Pill shape matches buttons for visual consistency. Status colors provide instant recognition without reading text.

$usage.positive: Completed, approved, active states — green bg #CDF0EA
$usage.warning: Attention needed, pending review — red-light bg #EDBCBC
$usage.regular: Neutral info, category labels — grey bg #EFF2F7
$usage.default: Removable filters, user selections — white bg with border
$usage.monogram: Person references — shows initials + name, blue bg #E2EDF1

$a11y.keyboard: If removable: Enter/Space removes, Backspace removes. Tab focusable.

$content.label: 1-2 words. Noun or adjective — 'Actief', 'In behandeling', 'Hypotheek'. No verbs.

codeExample.tailwind: bg-white border border-[var(--border/border-default,#c5dbe3)] h-[32px] rounded-[48px] px-[12px] text-[12px] leading-[16px]

messageBar.$description: Status message bars with icon, header, and body text.
messageBar.$why: Inline feedback within the page flow. Unlike alerts, message bars don't interrupt — they inform while the user continues working.

$usage.warning: Action needed but not blocking — 'Uw sessie verloopt over 5 minuten'
$usage.info: Helpful context — 'Dit formulier wordt automatisch opgeslagen'
$usage.error: Validation error at form/page level — 'Niet alle verplichte velden zijn ingevuld'

$a11y.close: If dismissible: close button with aria-label='Melding sluiten'

$content.header: Short summary — 'Fout bij opslaan', 'Sessie verloopt'. Optional.
$content.body: 1-2 sentences explaining what happened and what to do.

messageBar.$radiusNote: 8px — confirmed from Figma (rounded-[8px]), NOT 16px like cards/modals

$usage.when: Icon-only buttons, truncated text, abbreviations. Always pair with icon-only buttons.
$usage.avoid: Don't use for essential info (not visible on mobile/touch). Don't put interactive content in tooltips.

$a11y.keyboard: Appears on focus (not just hover). Escape dismisses.
$a11y.aria: aria-describedby on trigger element pointing to tooltip id.

$content.text: Max 1 sentence. Plain text only — no links, no formatting.

codeExample.tailwind: bg-[var(--surface/surface-help,#4a515b)] text-white rounded-[4px] px-[8px] py-[4px] text-[12px] leading-[16px]

controls.$description: Search bars, pagination, segmented controls, filter/sort.

illustrations.$description: Branded illustration scenes used across the product.

icons.$description: Icon set. Standard size 24x24px. Use within components at specified sizes.
icons.color: Inherits from parent text/icon color token

table.$description: Data tables with headers, rows, and alternating backgrounds.
table.$why: Mortgage data (rates, payments, scenarios) requires clear, scannable tables. Card-based design below 1024px ensures mobile usability.

$usage.when: Displaying structured data like loan comparison tables, amortization schedules, rate tables.
$usage.avoid: Don't use tables for layouts. Don't nest tables. Use card list below 1024px instead.

$a11y.keyboard: Focusable with Tab. Sorting headers are buttons.

$content.cells: Numeric or brief text. Use monospace for currency.

responsive.below: Card-based layout (one row per card, stack vertically)

rules: On dark bg: use white/light version
On light bg: use dark version

interactionStates.$description: Every interactive element must implement all 5 states.

shadcnMapping.$description: Maps Blinqx Figma components to shadcn/ui equivalents. AI tools: use these shadcn components with Blinqx styling overrides.

input.blinqxOverride: Bottom-border only, floating label pattern (custom, not stock shadcn)

alert.blinqxOverride: Custom icon circle per status type, H3 title in B120

tab.blinqxOverride: Active = border-bottom 2px B100, not bg change

chip.blinqxOverride: Pill shape, use positive/warning/regular color variants

switch.blinqxOverride: Track B100 when ON, border L100 when OFF

tooltip.blinqxOverride: bg N80, rounded-[4px], not default shadcn styling

datePicker.blinqxOverride: Selected day = B100 bg, today = B20 bg

menu.blinqxOverride: Dark theme for header menu, L30 bg for pull-downs

messageBar.blinqxOverride: Use status color patterns, rounded-[8px] NOT default

header.blinqxOverride: Full-width B20 bg with H1 title, see component-patterns.md

compositionRules.$description: Rules for how components combine. AI tools: follow these to avoid incorrect assembly.

card.titleBar: MUST have border-bottom 1px border-default if present
card.nesting: Cards go on page bg (L20). Never nest card inside card without visual separation.

modal.overlay: MUST have rgba(0,0,0,0.5) overlay behind modal
modal.actions: Primary button right, secondary/cancel left. Max 2 buttons.

alert.iconCircle: MUST match status type: error=R20/R100, warning=R40/R120, info=L30/B120, success=G20/G130

header.tabs: If tabs present, remove bottom padding — tabs touch bottom edge of header

messageBar.headerBody: If both header and body: header=bodyLBold, body=bodyM, gap=4px

form.inputGroups: Stack vertically, gap 16px. Pre-label inputs for horizontal layouts.
form.actions: Right-aligned, primary button right, cancel left

navigation.rule: Top bar OR sidebar — NEVER both simultaneously
navigation.sidebar: Logo at top (40x40, padding 20px), nav items below, settings/profile at bottom
navigation.topBar: Logo left (124x40), nav center, org picker + avatar right

imports.$description: Standard imports for Blinqx prototypes. Use these exact paths.

shadcn.Label: import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label'
shadcn.Card: import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'
shadcn.Dialog: import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogFooter } from '@/components/ui/dialog'
shadcn.AlertDialog: import { AlertDialog, AlertDialogAction, AlertDialogCancel, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/alert-dialog'
shadcn.Tabs: import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs'
shadcn.Tooltip: import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tooltip'
shadcn.DropdownMenu: import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuTrigger } from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu'

icons.example: import { Home, ChevronDown, User, X, Search, Filter, Plus, MoreHorizontal, Info, AlertTriangle, CheckCircle, XCircle } from 'lucide-react'

utils.note: cn() combines clsx + tailwind-merge for conditional class merging
